site.name: Source Learning Lab
site.rule: The site is organized as twelve first-class modules: pi-agent, mini-agent, cesium, openlayers, mapbox, digital-twin-city, llm-agent-interview, gaussian-splatting, econ-finance, stock-kline, quant-trading, and nuclear-battery. Common pages stay in pages/. Old pages URLs are compatibility redirects.

modules.name: Pi Agent
modules.purpose: Understand the Pi open-source agent architecture and key source code.

modules.name: Mini Agent
modules.purpose: Build a minimal agent from scratch, learn model API compatibility, and follow a hands-on path from CLI MVP to a usable web agent.

modules.name: Cesium
modules.purpose: Understand the 3D rendering path from Viewer to GPU.

modules.name: OpenLayers
modules.purpose: Understand the 2D map rendering path from Map/View/Layer/Source to Canvas/WebGL.

modules.name: Mapbox
modules.purpose: Understand Mapbox GL JS sources, layers, styles, vector tiles, rendering architecture, API debugging, and comparison with Cesium.

modules.name: Digital Twin City
modules.purpose: Understand how city-scale digital twin systems combine Mapbox, Cesium, 3D Tiles, real-time data, AI agents, backend services, frontend interaction, performance, and MVP planning.

modules.name: LLM Agent Interview
modules.purpose: Prepare for LLM and Agent algorithm interviews covering memory, RAG data engineering, long context versus RAG, and Transformer long-context optimization.

modules.name: Gaussian Splatting
modules.purpose: Understand 3D Gaussian Splatting training and realtime rendering from images to pixels.

modules.name: Stock K Line
modules.purpose: Learn stock candlestick charts, technical indicators, signal interpretation, timeframes, context, and risk control.

modules.name: Economics and Finance
modules.purpose: Build a foundational framework for economics and finance, covering scarcity, incentives, markets, cash flows, interest rates, risk, macro cycles, and learning roadmap.

modules.name: Quant Trading
modules.purpose: Understand quantitative trading research, backtesting, live architecture, common strategies, infrastructure, and risk controls.

modules.name: Nuclear Battery
modules.purpose: Understand RTGs, radioisotope power systems, betavoltaic batteries, and the difference between satellite atomic clocks and power sources.
